namespace Edict.Generated
{
    internal static class EdictEventStreamRegistrar
    {
        public static void Register(
            global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<
                global::System.Type, global::Edict.Contracts.Routing.EdictEventStreamAccessor> accessors)
        {
            accessors[typeof(global::Sample.OrderCancelledEvent)] = new global::Edict.Contracts.Routing.EdictEventStreamAccessor("Orders", static evt => ((global::Sample.OrderCancelledEvent)evt).OrderId);
            accessors[typeof(global::Sample.OrderPlacedEvent)] = new global::Edict.Contracts.Routing.EdictEventStreamAccessor("Orders", static evt => ((global::Sample.OrderPlacedEvent)evt).OrderId);
            accessors[typeof(global::Sample.PaymentAuthorizedEvent)] = new global::Edict.Contracts.Routing.EdictEventStreamAccessor("Payments", static evt => ((global::Sample.PaymentAuthorizedEvent)evt).PaymentId);
        }
    }
